action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline exprate is 0.75% after 15 epochs. Model severely underfitting. Key bug: validation uses init_hidden (zeros) instead of init_hidden_from_enc. Analysis: Need to fix validation hidden state init, add beam search, increase capacity, train longer. Decision: Major improvements - fix hidden init, larger model (hidden_dim=512, embed=256), better training with label smoothing, beam search in predict.py, train 40 epochs (~35 min).
